## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / component
- [ ] Enhancement to existing component
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for all changed behavior
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) — required for any user-facing change
- [ ] TypeScript types are correct and complete (no `any` shortcuts)
- [ ] Accessibility checked — keyboard navigation works, ARIA roles/labels in place
- [ ] Light mode and dark mode both tested visually
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
